channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Adobe Unveils Limited Beta for Firefly Video Model: A Game-Changer in Video Generation?
item.description: Adobe's latest generative AI model, Firefly Video, enables users to create short video clips from text and image prompts. Learn about the beta trial, pricing, and implications on the industry.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
